note: This package combines the user-owned source paper archive, modern literature, and a deterministic synthetic serialization probe.

source_paper.title: A Spatial Mapping Algorithm with Applications in Deep Learning-Based Structure Classification

synthetic_probe_dataset.description: Deterministic 16^3 voxel microenvironments combining backbone-like walks, dense pocket-like patches, and distractor voxels with three semantic channels.
synthetic_probe_dataset.positive_support_rule: At least one channel-1 neighbor, two channel-2 neighbors, and two channel-3 neighbors inside a 26-neighborhood.

primary_literature.title: Point Transformer
primary_literature.role: native point-based baseline that raised the post-2018 bar

primary_literature.title: Point Transformer V3: Simpler Faster Stronger
primary_literature.role: evidence that serialization became an explicit efficiency mechanism

primary_literature.title: PointMamba: A Simple State Space Model for Point Cloud Analysis
primary_literature.role: space-filling-curve tokenization for sequence-native point modeling

primary_literature.title: Voxel Mamba: Group-Free State Space Models for Point Cloud based 3D Object Detection
primary_literature.role: serialized voxel processing in a state-space framework

primary_literature.title: NoKSR: Kernel-Free Neural Surface Reconstruction via Point Cloud Serialization
primary_literature.role: serialization as a practical retrieval and aggregation primitive

primary_literature.title: AtoMAE: Learning Protein Structure Representations from Atomic Voxel Grids via Masked Autoencoders
primary_literature.role: modern biomolecular evidence that channel-rich structural learning remains live
